intro: An award-winning adventure about the momentum and whiplash of young adulthood
description:
You are Mara Whitefish, aspiring writer in the year 2003. No longer an adolescent, you’ve left your island home of Perfect Tides to attend university in The City. The fast tracks of adulthood lie ahead.

- Navigate through a year of Mara's life, complete with seasonal acts, non-linear exploration, and branching outcomes in a narrative adventure game.

- Collect an inventory of names and subjects to grow your understanding of topics through conversation, books, experience, and memory.

- Nurture new ideas and complete writing assignments based on what you’ve learned from your choices and interactions.

- Experience the thrills and agonies of complex relationships with friends, family, and romantic partners while finding your place in the world.

Where will Mara be when the year ends?

Perfect Tides: Station to Station is a critically-acclaimed narrative adventure. It received the 2026 Independent Games Festival (IGF) Excellence in Narrative award, as well as a nomination for the Seumas McNally Grand Prize.
